creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin 


HELP is on by default, so that cannot be the trigger.

Are you building with portmaster/portupgrade, and did you do a pkg autoremove at some point?


#  make all-depends-list -C devel/kf5-extra-cmake-modules | grep qt5-sqldrivers-sqlite3
/usr/ports/databases/qt5-sqldrivers-sqlite3


So it will just have to be made a runtime dep at the appropriate place... :)


mfg Tobias
